packageRules.description: engines.node is a deliberately chosen dev/pnpm compatibility floor (matches the main svelte-vitals repo's pnpm@11.x requirement) — never auto-bump it. The CI workflow's own node-version (a separate 'uses-with' dep) is unaffected and still updates normally.
Same maintainer, same trust boundary as this repo — the 3-day supply-chain wait below is for third-party deps, not our own just-published releases.
